nasb.text: The sons of Israel said to the Lord, “We have sinned, do to us whatever seems good to You; only please deliver us this day.”

esv.text: And the people of Israel said to the Lord, “We have sinned; do to us whatever seems good to you. Only please deliver us this day.”

cnv.text: 以色列人對耶和華說：“我們犯了罪了，你任意對待我們吧；只求你今日拯救我們。”

ccb.text: 他们对耶和华说：“我们犯了罪，任你处置我们，只求你今天拯救我们。”
